description: Three flexible items on-grid (per section 2.5 all authored values are quantum multiples): a{basis 9,flex 1}, b{basis 9,flex 2}, c{basis 12,flex 1}, all min 3, quantum 3 floor. Basis span 30, target 22, deficit 8. Weights flex*basis: a 9, b 18, c 12 (sum 39). Continuous: a 9-1.846=7.154, b 9-3.692=5.308, c 12-2.462=9.538 (no floor hit). Quantize floor: a 6, b 3, c 9 = 18. Residual 22-18=4 -> one whole quantum (3) back by largest remainder (a 1.154, b 2.308, c 0.538) -> b gets it: a 6, b 6, c 9 = 21, 1s slack, underflow ok. Adjudicated 2026-07-01: previous version authored basis 10 on quantum 3 (invalid per 2.5) and the engine had exempted off-quantum-value from compress validation to tolerate it; fixture fixed, exemption removed - spec wins over corpus.
